description: Canonical 15-value seeds with known characteristics. Each seed is a 3x5 matrix: 3 satellites x 5 directional components [prograde, retrograde, outward, inward, north].

neutral.description: Uniform allocation - each of 6 directions gets equal weight. Produces minimal net delta-V (drift only).
neutral.expected_behavior: Low signal energy, near-baseline phase rates

prograde_heavy.description: All satellites push prograde - raises all orbits in unison.
prograde_heavy.expected_behavior: Large positive range-rate change, high detectability

retrograde_heavy.description: All satellites push retrograde - lowers all orbits.
retrograde_heavy.expected_behavior: Large negative range-rate change, mirror of prograde_heavy

differential.description: Satellites maneuver differently - creates relative phase-rate signature.
differential.expected_behavior: Strong differential phase rates between pairs

radial_push.expected_behavior: Altitude excursion, returns to original orbit per Kepler

test_message_alpha.description: The standard test seed used across core module quick_tests.
test_message_alpha.expected_behavior: Mixed signal - each satellite has distinct profile
